data.title: The Salvation Army aids those affected by Winter Storm Fern with essential services amid freezing temps and heavy snowfall.
data.description: Amidst harsh winter storms bringing freezing temperatures and heavy precipitation nationwide, The Salvation Army in ALEXANDRIA, Va., announced on Jan. 27, 2026, that they are actively assisting vulnerable populations. They are offering crucial services to individuals and families affected by the snowfall, providing much-needed support during this challenging period.

data.title: SUNRATE acquires payments team with over a decade of experience to launch global acquiring services in 2026.
data.description: In Singapore on January 27, 2026, SUNRATE, a leading global payment and treasury management platform, revealed the purchase of a seasoned payments team boasting over ten years of industry expertise. This acquisition also includes mature acquiring systems and a well-established business.

data.title: NuLiv Science study shows AstraGin® supports intestinal barrier integrity and probiotic adhesion.
data.description: NuLiv Science, a prominent plant-based nutraceutical ingredients company headquartered in Brea, California, unveiled a recent preclinical study on January 27, 2026. The study focuses on examining the impact of AstraGin®, a patented compound developed from Astragalus, on individuals' well-being. AstraGin® is a product of NuLiv Science geared towards promoting healthier lifestyles.

data.title: Elevra Lithium (ASX: ELV; NASDAQ: ELVR; OTCQB: SYAXF) reports record revenue, profit at NAL amid production outlook adjustment.
data.description: Elevra Lithium Limited, based in Brisbane, Australia, announced on January 28, 2026, that they achieved a milestone by recording their highest-ever quarterly revenue and gross profit at their NAL site. The Company, listed as ELV on ASX, ELVR on NASDAQ, and SYAXF on OTCQB, also updated their production forecast to align with current operational circumstances.

data.title: Southwest now offers assigned seating, a change from its previous system. It was rolled out on Tuesday after listening to customer feedback.
data.description: The airline introduced a new policy on Tuesday in response to passenger feedback. While some customers appreciated the change, others felt that the previous system added to the appeal of the experience.
